commit.message:
fix: tune AI weights v5 — reduce wild/attack overuse, increase buying

Lower wild base score (20→10) with pair-in-hand penalty (0.3x), reduce
default wild weight (1.0→0.5). Cut attack base scores ~50% and lower
attack weights across all personas. Raise default buy weight (0.3→0.4)
to help deplete Major deck faster. Games now ~9.3 rounds (was 10.0),
wild usage halved, simulation speed nearly doubled.

commit.message:
feat: improve genderize.io accuracy with diacritics and compound name handling

Strip diacritical marks (José → Jose) and take first component of
hyphenated names (Jean-Pierre → Jean) before querying genderize.io,
per Santamaría & Mihaljević (2018). Reduces unrecognized names from
~16% to <1%.

fix: use CALL for all npm version checks in install.bat

npm is a .cmd wrapper -- calling without CALL can terminate batch flow.
Applied CALL to npm --version at initial check and post-winget verify.

feat: publish-ready UX — --help, onboard --auto, binary install script

- Fix --help/-h/help to show usage and exit 0 (was crashing with exit 1)
- Add onboard --auto --provider <id> --api-key <key> for non-interactive
  setup: validates required flags, runs live connection test, only saves
  config on success; keyless providers (vertex, bedrock) skip key check
- Rewrite install.sh: downloads pre-built binary from GitHub Releases
  (no Go required), detects OS/arch, auto-adds to PATH
- Add tool loop detection (4 strategies) and 50k tool result size cap
- Add session transcript repair for orphaned tool calls on load
- Add ${ENV_VAR} expansion in config at load time
- Add onboard --refresh for non-destructive config upgrade
- Update README: one-liner install at top, macOS/Linux pre-built option,
  accurate CLI reference with all new flags

commit.message:
Add document-level search endpoint with chunk aggregation (Step 2.4)

POST /api/v1/search/documents aggregates chunk scores per document
using max score, returns documents ranked by relevance with the
top-scoring chunk as snippet. SearchService.document_search() delegates
to the full hybrid pipeline then groups by document_id. Schema adds
DocumentSearchResultResponse and DocumentSearchResponse. 4 new tests
cover aggregation, max-score selection, snippet inclusion, and top_k.

commit.message:
Add P3 publish command + P4 quality governance Actions

P3 — radioheader publish:
- Three-gate pipeline: quality (4-dim ≥6/8), privacy (regex scan), dedup (slug+tags)
- Single file or --auto-detect mode (scans all local shortwave)
- Staged entries go to pending-publish/, pushed on next sync
- Fix grep -c bug: use grep|wc -l instead (grep -c exit code 1 on zero matches)

P4 — GitHub Actions (in radioheader-community repo):
- Weekly aggregate.py: votes → scores.json with pheromone decay formula
- Weekly archive.py: soft-delete low-quality, add verified tag to high-score entries
- Score formula: raw × e^(-age/180), negative votes weighted 2×

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: add DDoS protection & production middleware stack

- Add tower_governor per-IP rate limiting to /api (30 burst, 10s refill)
- Add ConcurrencyLimitLayer(500), TimeoutLayer(30s), RequestBodyLimitLayer(512KB) to /api
- Exclude /ws from all hardening layers (WebSocket connections stay open indefinitely)
- Add gzip compression layer
- Fix PORT env var (was hardcoded to 3000, now reads from .env)
- Add graceful shutdown on SIGINT via tokio::signal::ctrl_c

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(yield): add rate-derived APY for dividend-distributing tokens

BUIDL and YLDS maintain a $1.00 NAV and distribute yield as new tokens,
so price-derived APY returns ~0%. Add a new rate-derived resolution tier
that computes APY from the already-cached T-bill rate (FRED DGS3MO)
minus each token's management fee spread.

Configured tokens: BUIDL (-20 bps), YLDS (-50 bps), USTB (-15 bps),
mTBILL (0 bps). No new API calls or cron jobs — piggybacks on the
existing fetch-tbill-rate pipeline.

commit.message:
refactor: unified personality-weighted AI scoring system (v4)

Replace priority-based chooseAction() in all 9 AI personas with shared
scoreAction() from new personality.js. Each AI defines weight multipliers
for action types (sets, attacks, buying, tome, etc.) instead of rigid
priority chains. Adds controlled noise via state.rng for human-like
variance. Fixes MCTS to use shared scoreAction instead of removed
ScoringAI.simulateAction(). Win rates now balanced 16-32% across all AIs.

commit.message:
Rewrite base detection and fix cascading VCP/consolidation/numbering bugs

Base detection:
- Rewrote detect_bases() to find swing-high-anchored consolidation
  patterns instead of mechanically chopping data into max-length windows
- Old algorithm walked backwards expanding range until depth limit,
  producing uniform 65/200-day blocks that weren't real consolidations
- New algorithm finds local price peaks, then identifies the sideways
  consolidation period that formed after each peak
- Tightened defaults: 15-65 day bases (was 20-200), 30% max depth (was 35%)

VCP and consolidation:
- Now computed for ALL Stage 2 stocks with bases, not just those with
  active breakouts. Previously most stocks showed blank VCP/Grade columns
- VCP detection criteria unchanged (2+ contractions at <60% ratio) —
  VCPs are genuinely rare, empty is correct when not present

Base numbering:
- Fixed number_bases_in_stage2() to use 200 MA (not 150) with tolerance
  for brief 1-2 day dips below the MA, avoiding false Stage 2 start dates
- base_count_in_stage2 now properly reflects which base in the S2 advance

UI cleanup (Stock Opportunities):
- Shortened column headers (S2, Base, Wkly, BO, Pipe, TopSec) to fit
- Rounded Close prices to 1 decimal
- Added color coding for consolidation Grade (A+/A = green, B = lime)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
